prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-ASRO-12PCGEODEKIT-BUN-AMZ Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 12pc Break Your Own Geodes Kit with Sledge Hammer and Safety Goggles (Assorted Size Geodes) Description: Ever wondered what lies inside these old, rugged rocks? Crack open a hands on adventure with Break Your Own Geodes Kit from ASR Outdoor! Perfect for curious minds, rock collectors, hobbyists, kids or geology enthusiasts alike, these break your own geodes let you crack open your very own rocks to discover absolutely stunning crystals hidden within! Sourced from Morocco, our authentic and genuine geodes are 100% natural, and will range in sizes from two to five inches in diameter. Kit includes ten assorted size geodes, one sledge hammer and a pair of safety goggles.

Amaze and Delight: Each geode is a unique, natural masterpiece, showcasing vibrant crystals and intricate formations; no two rocks are the same!

Perfect for All Ages: Ideal for geology enthusiasts, hobbyists, or anyone who loves discovering nature’s surprises

Educational and Entertaining: A fantastic way to learn about the Earth's geological processes while enjoying a hands on experience

How to Break Open Geodes: Use the included ten inch sledge hammer to crack open the Moroccan geodes and reveal the stunning and glistening crystal interior (adult supervision required)

A great learning activity for kids, these natural wonders will awe and inspire budding geologists with their naturally formed spectacular crystal interior. Kids can start or add these amazing specimens to their very own rock collection. Geodes are fascinating natural formations that arise through a unique geological process, all of which is explained in the included educational insert. Discover nature’s hidden treasure with ASR Outdoors Break Your Own Geodes Kit!

NOTE: Children should not attempt breaking geode rocks open without adult supervision and should wear included safety goggles Search Terms: Geodes for kids to break open geology gemstone dig kit fossils paleontology archeology mining science kits for kids age 5 8 crystals and stones learning toys gold prospecting equipment rockhounding tools amethyst pyrite crystal family games Features: - BREAK YOUR OWN GEODES: Perfect for curious minds, rock collectors, hobbyists, kids or geology enthusiasts alike, these break your own geodes from Morocco let you crack open your very own geodes to discover absolutely stunning crystals hidden within - SMALL BATCH TOY MANUFACTURER: This science fundamental childrens kit is hand-made to order in the USA; included is (4) large geodes and (6) medium geodes; these all-organic pieces are unique to each kit (no two kits are the same) - SCIENCE KIT: A great hands on learning activity for kids, these natural wonders will awe and inspire budding geologists with their naturally formed spectacular crystal interior; kids can start or add these amazing specimens to their very own rock collection - MINI SLEDGE HAMMER TO BREAK OPEN GEODES: Use the included ten inch kid sized sledge hamme to crack open geodes and reveal the stunning and glistening crystal interior; Children should not attempt breaking geode rocks without full adult supervision - 100% ALL NATURAL GEODES: Sourced from Morocco, our authentic and genuine geodes are 100% natural; geodes will range in sizes from two to five inches in diameter and are hand picked to ensure top quality; Kit components feature all natural components direct from planet earth === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
